# Timepill project instructions

- Use TypeScript.
- Keep the Expo Router structure.
- Do not modify node_modules or .expo.
- Prefer minimal and safe edits.
- Keep the current tab structure: 홈, 복약등록, 기록, 설정.
- Use clean dark card-style UI.
- Add simple validation for form inputs.
- Briefly explain changed files after edits.
